name: SolarCity Corporation
description: SolarCity Corporation was a prominent American company that specialized in the sale, installation, and maintenance of solar energy generation systems for residential, commercial, and industrial customers. Founded in 2006 and headquartered in California, the company played a significant role in the expansion of distributed solar power in the United States. In 2016, SolarCity was acquired by Tesla, Inc. for approximately $2.6 billion. Following the acquisition, its operations were integrated into Tesla Energy, where its solar products and services continue to be offered under the Tesla brand, including the Solar Roof and Powerwall technologies.
